positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial wanderer silhouette. The scene depicts a stylized astronaut floating amidst glowing geometric nebula clouds, surrounded by abstract constellations and ethereal cosmic dust. Use strong, vibrant neon colors (deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta) contrasted against a deep, matte black background. The style should be modern, flat graphic design with high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Ensure the subject is centrally composed and the overall composition is clean and graphic, emphasizing strong outlines and clear visual separation between elements. Vector art aesthetic, clean lines, symmetrical feel.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy lines, low detail, artifact, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy
